ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the package */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License of the package */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports from parent package */,
  "parent_package" TEXT /* Name of the parent package being imported */,
  "num_imports" INTEGER /* Number of imports from the parent package */,
  "import_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods used from the parent package */,
  "import_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes used from the parent package */,
  "import_functions" INTEGER /* Number of functions used from the parent package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that requires other packages */,
  "required_package" TEXT /* Name of the required package */,
  "version_required" TEXT /* Version of the required package */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., 'Depends', 'Imports', 'Suggests') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness_scores" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness score */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package with the heaviness score */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the heaviness score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_scores_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the package version */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Archive date of the package version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_package_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_package_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_package_access_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that was rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_ratings_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_tags_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
